template_block.name: goal
template_block.title: Goal
template_block.statement: Capture assumptions and knowledge gaps as testable hypotheses, with risks if wrong.

template_block.name: context
template_block.title: Context
template_block.statement: We are in Discovery. Nothing is validated.

template_block.name: source
template_block.title: Source
template_block.statement: Only use what I provide. If evidence is missing, mark as Assumption.

template_block.name: step-2-convert-suspected-truths-to-hypotheses
template_block.title: Step 2 – Convert suspected truths to hypotheses
template_block.statement: Rewrite each suspected item as a Hypothesis.

template_block.name: step-3-risk-if-wrong
template_block.title: Step 3 – Risk if wrong
template_block.statement: For each hypothesis, record impact and likelihood (or Unknown).

template_block.name: step-4-test-approach
template_block.title: Step 4 – Test approach
template_block.statement: Define 1–2 ways to test each hypothesis.

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine‑Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: discovery_integrity: description: Hypotheses must not be treated as facts. rule: Reject outputs that read as validated or decided.
evidence_unit_structure: required_fields: [id, source, type, statement, confidence, status] severity: error
evidence_unit_no_interpretation: disallowed_terms: [therefore, indicates, proves] severity: error
tone: allowed: [neutral, analytical, explicit about uncertainty] severity: error ```
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
